Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-16-workspace-agent-defs-pd-ui-pd-ocr-ops.md

nodes.body: Done: .claude/agents/pd-ocr-ops.md and .claude/agents/pd-ui.md both exist in the workspace with full routing definitions.
